positive: A highly stylized, minimalist celestial fox silhouette, sitting peacefully on a stylized crescent moon. The fox is depicted in a flowing, ethereal style with multiple tails, rendered against a deep midnight blue cosmic background that transitions into soft nebula purples and violets. Use strong graphic contrast (black silhouette on colored background). The overall composition should be perfectly centered, suitable for apparel printing. High contrast vector art style, clean linework, elegant, magical realism, symmetrical composition, vibrant glow effects, cinematic lighting, high detail, merchandise art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, text, watermark, signature, cropped, logo, trademark, low detail, messy, noise, extra limbs, badly drawn hands, amateur, anime style
